title: Automation to clear/delete subitems
excerpt: We have different subitem task lists associated with different phases of work, designated via groups or statuses within a board. We have an automation set up to add subitems when the item is moved or updated, but these s…

posts.author: KPal (Kristen Palczewski)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have different subitem task lists associated with different phases of work, designated via groups or statuses within a board. We have an automation set up to add subitems when the item is moved or updated, but these subitems tend to accumulate, whereas we don’t need to retain the completed subitems from the previous phase of work.
My request is that an automation capability be added to clear subitems, similar to existing options to clear a column or assignees.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @KPal

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. It also includes the ability to automatically archive subitems here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-03-06 at 15.37.382080×396 30.2 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
